canonical.title: Git decision from ced1990c1cab
canonical.content:
Git decision from ced1990c1cab

Source commit: ced1990c1cab
Paths: hermes_cli/main.py, hermes_cli/tools_config.py, tests/hermes_cli/test_install_cua_driver.py, website/docs/reference/cli-commands.md, website/docs/user-guide/features/computer-use.md
Summary: feat(computer-use): refresh cua-driver on `hermes update` + add `install --upgrade` (#24063) cua-driver was only installed once on toolset enable: `_run_post_setup` early-returns when the binary is already on PATH, so upstream fixes (e.g. v0.1.6 Safari window-focus fix) never reached existing users without manual reins

op.evidence: commit ced1990c1cab classified as decision paths=hermes_cli/main.py,hermes_cli/tools_config.py,tests/hermes_cli/test_install_cua_driver.py,website/docs/reference/cli-commands.md,website/docs/user-guide/features/computer-use.md message=feat(computer-use): refresh cua-driver on `hermes update` + add `install --upgrade` (#24063) cua-driver was only installed once on toolset enable: `_run_post_setup` early-returns when the binary is already on PATH, so upstream fixes (e.g. v0.1.6 Safari window-focus fix) never reached existing users without manual reins

canonical.content:
Git lesson from 99ad2d1372d3

Source commit: 99ad2d1372d3
Paths: hermes_cli/tools_config.py, hermes_cli/web_server.py, pyproject.toml, tests/tools/test_transcription_dotenv_fallback.py, tests/tools/test_transcription_tools.py, tests/tools/test_tts_mistral.py, tools/transcription_tools.py, tools/tts_tool.py
Summary: fix(deps): unbreak [all] install — drop mistralai while PyPI quarantined (#24205) The `mistralai` PyPI package was quarantined on 2026-05-12 after a malicious 2.4.6 release. Every fresh resolve (AUR makepkg, Docker build, CI run, install.sh first-run) currently fails on `mistralai>=2.3.0,<3` because PyPI returns zero

canonical.title: Git decision from d186186e1af7
canonical.content:
Git decision from d186186e1af7

Source commit: d186186e1af7
Paths: scripts/install.sh, setup-hermes.sh
Summary: fix(install): surface uv install + uv.lock sync errors instead of silently hanging (#24504) The c1eb2dcda tiered installer made two install paths look frozen on slow networks or broken environments because both swallowed the underlying tool's stderr. scripts/install.sh, setup-hermes.sh: curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/
